name: The guarded hall
description:
You walk down a torch lit hallway. It has been carved out of pure stone. 
It is very quiet in this hall. You notice rows of colored doors on each 
wall. To your east, you see a holy door. To your west, you see a red 
door. The hall itself leads south and north.

extra_descriptions.description: You see a holy door. It has the name "Avatar" written on it.
